gaps: No test case covers the Home Screen UI rendering after device pairing — specifically the headset image/icon display for Voyager Free 60+ or Voyager Free 20.
No test case validates that device-specific assets (product images) load correctly on the Home Screen post-pairing.
No test case covers the pairing flow end-to-end from the perspective of Home Screen visual elements updating after a device is connected.
No test case differentiates between Voyager Free 60+ and Voyager Free 20 for Home Screen asset rendering — both models are mentioned in the bug but neither is tested.
No test case covers the scenario where a device is paired but the app fails to display its corresponding product image on the Home Screen.
No lifecycle or state transition test exists that validates Home Screen content after Bluetooth pairing completes (e.g., pairing -> connected -> Home Screen refresh).

generated_testcases.title: TC-HOME-IMG-001: Verify Voyager Free 60+ product image displays on Home Screen after initial pairing
steps: Ensure no Poly device is currently paired or connected to the phone.
Open Poly Studio Mobile app → observe the Home Screen (should show 'No device connected' or similar).
Put Voyager Free 60+ earbuds into pairing mode (open charge case, press and hold pairing button).
On the phone, go to Bluetooth settings → pair with 'Poly Voyager Free 60+'.
Return to Poly Studio Mobile app → observe the Home Screen.
Verify the Home Screen displays the Voyager Free 60+ product image/icon (not a generic placeholder or missing image).
Verify the device name 'Poly Voyager Free 60+' is displayed below or beside the product image.
Verify the connection status indicator shows 'Connected'.
generated_testcases.expected: The Home Screen in Poly Studio Mobile app displays the correct Voyager Free 60+ product image/icon, the device name 'Poly Voyager Free 60+', and a 'Connected' status indicator. No broken image placeholder or generic icon is shown.

generated_testcases.title: TC-HOME-IMG-002: Verify Voyager Free 20 product image displays on Home Screen after initial pairing
steps: Ensure no Poly device is currently paired or connected to the phone.
Open Poly Studio Mobile app → observe the Home Screen (should show 'No device connected' or similar).
Put Voyager Free 20 earbuds into pairing mode.
On the phone, go to Bluetooth settings → pair with 'Poly Voyager Free 20'.
Return to Poly Studio Mobile app → observe the Home Screen.
Verify the Home Screen displays the Voyager Free 20 product image/icon (distinct from the Voyager Free 60+ image).
Verify the device name 'Poly Voyager Free 20' is displayed below or beside the product image.
Verify the connection status indicator shows 'Connected'.
generated_testcases.expected: The Home Screen in Poly Studio Mobile app displays the correct Voyager Free 20 product image/icon, the device name 'Poly Voyager Free 20', and a 'Connected' status indicator. The image should be visually distinct from the Voyager Free 60+ product image.

generated_testcases.title: TC-HOME-IMG-003: Verify Home Screen product image persists after app backgrounding and foregrounding with Voyager Free 60+
steps: Pair and connect Voyager Free 60+ to the phone via Bluetooth.
Open Poly Studio Mobile app → verify the Home Screen shows the Voyager Free 60+ product image and 'Connected' status.
Press the Home button on the phone to background the app.
Wait 10 seconds.
Reopen Poly Studio Mobile app from the recent apps list.
Observe the Home Screen.
generated_testcases.expected: The Home Screen still displays the Voyager Free 60+ product image correctly. No broken image, placeholder, or missing asset is shown. The device name and connection status remain accurate.

generated_testcases.title: TC-HOME-IMG-004: Verify Home Screen product image persists after app force-kill and relaunch with Voyager Free 20
steps: Pair and connect Voyager Free 20 to the phone via Bluetooth.
Open Poly Studio Mobile app → verify the Home Screen shows the Voyager Free 20 product image and 'Connected' status.
Fully close (force-kill) the Poly Studio Mobile app from the recent apps list.
Wait 5 seconds.
Reopen Poly Studio Mobile app.
Observe the Home Screen.
generated_testcases.expected: The Home Screen displays the Voyager Free 20 product image correctly after app relaunch. No broken image, placeholder, or missing asset is shown. The device name and connection status remain accurate.

generated_testcases.title: TC-HOME-IMG-005: Verify Home Screen product image updates correctly when switching from Voyager Free 60+ to Voyager Free 20
steps: Pair and connect Voyager Free 60+ to the phone via Bluetooth.
Open Poly Studio Mobile app → verify the Home Screen shows the Voyager Free 60+ product image.
Disconnect Voyager Free 60+ (turn off earbuds or disable Bluetooth on the earbuds).
Put Voyager Free 20 earbuds into pairing mode.
On the phone, go to Bluetooth settings → pair with 'Poly Voyager Free 20'.
Return to Poly Studio Mobile app → observe the Home Screen.
Verify the Home Screen now displays the Voyager Free 20 product image (not the Voyager Free 60+ image).
Verify the device name updates to 'Poly Voyager Free 20'.
generated_testcases.expected: The Home Screen correctly updates to show the Voyager Free 20 product image and device name after switching devices. The previous Voyager Free 60+ image is no longer displayed.

generated_testcases.title: TC-HOME-IMG-006: Verify Home Screen product image displays correctly after Bluetooth disconnect and reconnect cycle (Voyager Free 60+)
steps: Pair and connect Voyager Free 60+ to the phone via Bluetooth.
Open Poly Studio Mobile app → verify the Home Screen shows the Voyager Free 60+ product image and 'Connected' status.
Turn off the Voyager Free 60+ earbuds (or put them in the case and close the lid).
Wait for the app to update → verify the Home Screen shows 'Disconnected' or 'No device connected' and the product image may be grayed out or removed.
Turn on the Voyager Free 60+ earbuds (or open the case lid) to trigger Bluetooth reconnection.
Wait for the app to update → observe the Home Screen.
Verify the Home Screen displays the Voyager Free 60+ product image again with 'Connected' status.
generated_testcases.expected: After Bluetooth disconnect, the Home Screen correctly reflects the disconnected state. After reconnection, the Voyager Free 60+ product image and 'Connected' status are restored correctly with no missing or broken image.

generated_testcases.title: TC-HOME-IMG-007: Verify Home Screen product image for Voyager Free 60+ after phone reboot
steps: Pair and connect Voyager Free 60+ to the phone via Bluetooth.
Open Poly Studio Mobile app → verify the Home Screen shows the Voyager Free 60+ product image and 'Connected' status.
Reboot the phone.
After phone restarts, ensure Bluetooth is enabled.
Wait for automatic reconnection to Voyager Free 60+ (or manually reconnect via Bluetooth settings).
Open Poly Studio Mobile app.
Observe the Home Screen.
generated_testcases.expected: After phone reboot and Bluetooth reconnection, the Home Screen displays the Voyager Free 60+ product image correctly. No broken image, placeholder, or missing asset is shown. The device name and connection status are accurate.

generated_testcases.title: TC-HOME-IMG-008: Verify Home Screen does not show a generic/incorrect image when Voyager Free 60+ is paired but app was opened before pairing completed
steps: Ensure no Poly device is currently paired or connected.
Open Poly Studio Mobile app → Home Screen shows 'No device connected'.
While the app remains open in the foreground, put Voyager Free 60+ into pairing mode.
On the phone, go to Bluetooth settings → pair with 'Poly Voyager Free 60+'.
Return to Poly Studio Mobile app (do not force-kill or background it).
Observe the Home Screen for up to 30 seconds as the app detects the newly paired device.
Verify the Home Screen updates to show the Voyager Free 60+ product image.
Verify the device name 'Poly Voyager Free 60+' and 'Connected' status appear.
generated_testcases.expected: The Home Screen dynamically updates to display the correct Voyager Free 60+ product image, device name, and connection status without requiring an app restart or backgrounding. No generic placeholder or incorrect image is shown during the transition.

generated_testcases.title: TC-HOME-IMG-009: Verify Home Screen product image for Voyager Free 20 during low battery condition
steps: Pair and connect Voyager Free 20 to the phone via Bluetooth.
Open Poly Studio Mobile app → verify the Home Screen shows the Voyager Free 20 product image and 'Connected' status.
Allow the Voyager Free 20 battery to drain to a low level (or simulate via test fixture if available).
Observe the Home Screen in Poly Studio Mobile app.
Verify the Voyager Free 20 product image is still displayed correctly (not replaced by a placeholder).
Verify the battery indicator shows low battery level next to the product image.
generated_testcases.expected: The Voyager Free 20 product image remains correctly displayed on the Home Screen even during low battery conditions. The battery indicator accurately reflects the low charge level, but the product image itself is not affected.

generated_testcases.title: TC-HOME-IMG-010: Verify Home Screen product image for Voyager Free 60+ with Touchscreen Charge Case connected via USB-C
steps: Pair and connect Voyager Free 60+ to the phone via Bluetooth.
Open Poly Studio Mobile app → verify the Home Screen shows the Voyager Free 60+ product image.
Connect the Voyager Free 60+ charge case to a power source via USB-C cable.
Observe the Home Screen in Poly Studio Mobile app.
Verify the Voyager Free 60+ product image is still displayed correctly.
Verify the charging indicator on the Home Screen (if applicable) reflects the charging state of the case/earbuds.
generated_testcases.expected: The Voyager Free 60+ product image remains correctly displayed on the Home Screen when the charge case is connected via USB-C. The charging state is accurately reflected without affecting the product image rendering.
